_attribution.note: Independently authored. Reference patterns observed in SebTheSigma/JSON-UI-Maker (no LICENSE declared upstream); no source code copied. Names and shapes match Mojang vanilla packs (common.json, common_dialogs.json, common_buttons.json, server_form.json, ui_screens.json, ui_defs.json) which are the de facto vanilla preset surface.

common_refs.purpose: Vanilla generic button skeleton; override $pressed_button_name and content variables.
Standard 'X' close button; pair with $pressed_button_name to handle close action.
Generic scroll_view scaffold with bar/track/viewport sub-controls preconfigured.

common_dialogs_refs.purpose: Title-bar + body modal frame without OK/Cancel; use for forms or custom dialogs.
Title-bar + body + OK/Cancel pair; standard confirm dialog frame.
Centered title label sized for the standard dialog header.

common_buttons_refs.purpose: Light-themed clickable content button used for menu rows / form buttons.

server_form_refs.purpose: Default scrolling form layout used by ScriptAPI/Player.sendForm; override $title_text and the body $form_buttons collection.
Inner body grid for long_form; pair with #form_buttons collection bindings.

ir_extends_usage.shape: string referencing a vanilla preset, e.g. 'common_dialogs.main_panel_no_buttons'
ir_extends_usage.compiler_behavior: When set, the compiled control name becomes 'name@<extends>' and any 'variables' field on the IR element is emitted verbatim into the JSON UI node. Layout (anchor/offset/size) is still emitted from the solver.
